checks.name: Test files exist
checks.evidence: 381 test files found (*.test.ts, *.test.tsx, *.spec.tsx patterns). 1617 total source files (*.ts, *.tsx, *.js). Ratio: 23.6% — above 10% threshold but below 60% full-marks threshold. Test directories include src/atomic-crm/activities/__tests__/, src/atomic-crm/contacts/__tests__/, src/atomic-crm/dashboard/__tests__/, src/atomic-crm/providers/supabase/__tests__/, and 10+ others. SQL tests also present at supabase/tests/database/.
checks.remediation: Increase test coverage to reach the 60%+ ratio (>970 test files) for full marks. Focus on untested feature modules and provider handlers.

checks.name: Test runner configured
checks.evidence: Vitest configured in package.json. Scripts: "test": "node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs", "test:ci": "node scripts/test-sharded.mjs", "test:coverage": vitest run --coverage, "test:unit": vitest run src/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}. vitest@^3.2.4 and @vitest/coverage-v8@^3.2.4 present in devDependencies. vite.config.ts also exists for test configuration.

checks.name: CI/CD pipeline exists
checks.evidence: GitHub Actions workflows found at .github/workflows/: ci.yml, security.yml, supabase-deploy.yml. ci.yml has a dedicated 'Tests' job (line 94-108) running 'npm run test:ci' on ubuntu-latest, triggered on push to main and all pull_requests. Also includes Quality job (lint, tsc, UI pattern compliance) and Build job.

checks.name: Pre-commit hooks configured
checks.evidence: Husky pre-commit hook present at .husky/pre-commit (188 lines). Enforces: .env file blocking, UI pattern compliance (native select, hardcoded colors), TypeScript incremental type-check, semantic color validation, and SQL migration validation. husky@^9.1.7 in devDependencies. 'prepare' script in package.json installs husky on npm install.

checks.name: Claude Code hooks configured
checks.evidence: .claude/settings.json contains both PreToolUse and PostToolUse hooks. PreToolUse: migration-guard.ts on Edit/Write, verification-before-git.ts and supabase-cli-guard.ts on Bash. PostToolUse: prettier-format.ts, eslint-check.ts, post-tool-use-tracker.ts on Edit/Write, track-test-run.ts on Bash. Stop hook: verify-tests-before-stop.ts.

checks.name: Test command cross-validation
checks.evidence: CLAUDE.md (line: '**Test:** `npm test` — Vitest') specifies 'npm test'. package.json "test" script runs vitest via 'node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs'. Commands are consistent: both reference npm test invoking vitest. CI uses 'npm run test:ci' (sharded variant) which is a documented CI-specific alias.
